---
title: "Stress Analysis Basics"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  error: false
jupyter: python3
---

# Overview

This notebook introduces the basic equations used in introductory stress analysis:

- axial stress
- bending stress
- direct shear stress
- torsional shear stress
- combined loading
- von Mises stress
- factor of safety

The goal is to combine **engineering explanation**, **Python code**, and **results** in one study document.

## Import the reusable library

```{python}
from stress_analysis_basic import (
    area_circle,
    area_annulus,
    second_moment_circle,
    second_moment_annulus,
    polar_moment_circle,
    polar_moment_annulus,
    axial_stress,
    bending_stress,
    direct_shear_stress,
    torsional_shear_stress,
    combine_normal_stress,
    resultant_shear_2d,
    resultant_shear_primary_secondary,
    von_mises_plane_stress,
    stress_state_2d,
    factor_of_safety_yield,
)
